Description: Index membership flag for the WisdomTree WTLDI index on the date (1 = included, 0 = not included)
Membership flag indicating whether the security is included in the WTMDI index on the given date (1=included, 0 or NA=not included)
Index membership flag indicating whether the security is included in the WisdomTree WTSDI index on the given date (1=included, 0/NA=not included)
